CustomField.description: Date the statutory clock suspension ended. When populated, the NEPA_SLA_Due_Date_Setter recalculates nepa_fra_adjusted_deadline__c by adding (pause_end - pause_start) days to nepa_fra_statutory_deadline__c.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Date the clock suspension ended. Triggers automatic adjusted deadline recalculation.
CustomField.label: Clock Pause End
